text.heading: DEPARTMENT OF PHILOSOPHY
FACULTY OF ARTS
XXX UNIVERSITY
INSTITUTION OF THE XXX PRIZE FOR THE BEST STUDENT GRADUATING STUDENT IN PHILOSOPHY/SOCIOLOGY COMBINED HONOURS IN PHILOSOPHY
INTRODUCTION
text.p: The Department of Philosophy wishes to establish a Prize in the name of a former student, late Miss . The Prize is to be awarded to the best Graduating student in Philosophy/Sociology [Combined Honours] in the Department of Philosophy with a GCPA of not less than 3.50. A cheque of Naira (N) has been forwarded by the family of Mrs - the sponsor of the prize.
text.heading: BACKGROUND INFORMATION
text.p:
Late Miss
graduated in Philosophy/Sociology with the Second Class Upper (B.A Philosophy/Sociology) in 2007/2008 Session. She died on Sunday 4th January, 2009, a few weeks after her graduation. While alive as a student, she was cool-headed, lovely and hard-working. displayed a high sense of faith that she could still go through the demand of hardwork that University education requires despite the fact that she was medically challenged (she had Sickle Cell Anaemia).
text.heading: RECOMMENDATION
text.p:
Late Miss
lived an exemplary life of courage and hardwork in the midst of medical challenges and still struggled to make a very Good Grade in her B.A. (Hons) Degree in Philosophy/Sociology. The Department of Philosophy wishes to recommend that the late Miss
prize for the Best Student in Philosophy/Sociology [Combined Honours] with not less than 3.50 be instituted in the University.
